sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nang deih bang Topa, Nang deih bangbang!
Nangmah beelseek pa, Kei tungman bang.
Nangma
deih bangin, kei hong bawl in;
Tang lo, mang dingin, Nang kong ngak hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nang deih
bang Topa, Nang deih bangbang;
Tuni in Topa, Hong sit in Nang!
Vuk sang ngo zaw in, Tu’n
hong sawp in;
Lungsim neem takin, Nang mai kong kun.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nang deih bang Topa, Nang deih
bangbang!
Ka liam ka gimna, Hong huh in, Nang!
Vangliatna khempeuh, Nangma’n na
nei;
Hong damsak in kei, Hong honpa aw.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Nang deih bang Topa, Nang deih
bangbang!
Keima nuntakna, Hong uk in, Nang!
Khazih keima sung, Mi’n muhna ding;
Hong
guan in kei sung, Na Kha Siangtho.
